title: Shinji Rei Incest
wikitext:
[]: Shinji + Rei = Incest?             Quote Post by Stryker » Thu May 26, 2011 5:14 pm From here . Bagheera wrote: Cuz incest is best, amirite?

[]:             Quote Post by Crash Cortez » Thu May 26, 2011 5:21 pm I would say (genetically) yes. Since Rei is a clone of Yui. Biologically she is his mother. Rei and Yui are two different people because of their experiences and souls, but Rei is still a clone of Yui. If Shinji and Rei had a kid it would be Shinji’s brother/son or sister/daughter.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu May 26, 2011 5:22 pm The logical answer would be either "both" or "neither" since the Yui thing doesn't take away from the Lillith thing or vice versa. But if anything, Rei would be something like a cousin (You can marry those) - Because, duh, the closest thing to a clone in nature is a twin. So if she was 100% Yui, she'd be something like an aunt. But there's also Lillith added in, so even less than an aunt... But neither really applies because... think, why do we find incest squicky? Because of a) the effect on the children - Rei can't have any b) the twisting of family relationships - Rei didn't give birth to him, she didn't grow up alongside him, they met met after/during the process of sexual maturation, there's no dependency or usage angle.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Thu May 26, 2011 5:22 pm Crash Cortez wrote: I would say (genetically) yes. Since Rai is a clone of Yui. Biologically she is his mother. Rai and Yui are two different people because of their experiences and souls, but rai is still a clone of Yui. If Shinji and Rai had a kid it would be Shinji’s brother/son or sister/daughter.

[]:             Quote Post by Crash Cortez » Thu May 26, 2011 5:28 pm yeah doing 10 things at once and my spell check did that. lol

[]: Re: Shinji + Rei = Incest?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu May 26, 2011 5:38 pm Stryker wrote: Shinji + Rei = Incest?

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Thu May 26, 2011 6:18 pm Well, genetically it'd be incest, but is Rei even capable of having children? Otherwise, I don't see what's wrong with it.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu May 26, 2011 6:22 pm Not only is Rei literally clone of Shinji's mommy, she's symbolic Mother of the series whose womb Shinji must leave in the end (EoE) AND she's literally Mother of All Mankind aka Mother f*cking Nature. It would be incestuous on a colossal scale never rivalled in fiction

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu May 26, 2011 6:28 pm EoE states Rei as being "hope" the one he gets an epic pating scene with is Yui. The point about Rei is that she's neither Yui nor Lillith but an idividual that can, for example, fall in love with person Yui and/or Lillith wouldn't fall in love with. Rei didn't exactly act like a "person to retreat to" at any moment - from the very beginning onwards, she had no problems with telling him that yes, duh, he has to get into ze mecha or else pack his bags, that's how it is, he had to invest into her before getting anything in return.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu May 26, 2011 6:47 pm Kendrix wrote: Rei didn't exactly act like a "person to retreat to" at any moment

[]:             Quote Post by Tarnsman » Thu May 26, 2011 6:57 pm Xard wrote: Except that Anno conceived Rei as oedipal figure from the start. Derp.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu May 26, 2011 6:58 pm Tarnsman wrote: Anno likes to get pissed off at people for liking Rei, while rolling around in his piles of money he made from all the Rei merchandise.

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Thu May 26, 2011 7:10 pm I'm not sure what's wrong with being upset that people didn't receive a part of your story as you would've liked but being able to accept the financial success of the story. It's not like Anno said he would ever refuse the money off of Evangelion.

[]: Re: Shinji + Rei = Incest?             Quote Post by symbv » Thu May 26, 2011 7:37 pm Mr.Tines wrote: You seem to have misspelt rishathra.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu May 26, 2011 9:12 pm Kendrix wrote: But if anything, Rei would be something like a cousin (You can marry those) -

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Thu May 26, 2011 9:33 pm Tarnsman wrote: They're genetically related, that's incest.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Thu May 26, 2011 9:34 pm Stryker wrote: Your logic suggests that having sex with anyone would be incest, considering how everyone on the planet is genetically related.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu May 26, 2011 9:49 pm esselfortium wrote: They're very closely genetically related, to the same extent that a brother and sister would be.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Thu May 26, 2011 9:53 pm Rishathra sounds a lot closer to the truth then incest.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Thu May 26, 2011 9:57 pm Bagheera wrote: What makes me sad about all of this is that that's a very interesting concept. I think Asuka would be okay with it once she understood the particulars, and I think the relationship itself has a lot to offer. And yet, in the context of the shipping wars, nobody pays it the slightest mind. It's very sad. :(
summary:
[]: Shinji + Rei = Incest?             Quote Post by Stryker » Thu May 26, 2011 5:14 pm From here . Bagheera wrote: Cuz incest is best, amirite?

[]:             Quote Post by Crash Cortez » Thu May 26, 2011 5:21 pm I would say (genetically) yes. Since Rei is a clone of Yui. Biologically she is his mother. Rei and Yui are two different people because of their experiences and so
